mapper.select: SELECT request_id, group_id, user_key, status, requested_at, approved_at, reject_reason FROM group_join_request WHERE user_key = #{userKey} ORDER BY requested_at DESC
SELECT request_id, group_id, user_key, status, requested_at, approved_at, reject_reason FROM group_join_request WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY requested_at ASC
SELECT request_id, group_id, user_key, status, requested_at, approved_at, reject_reason FROM group_join_request WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY requested_at ASC
SELECT user_key FROM group_join_request WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_join_request WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_key = #{userKey} AND status = 'PENDING'
